title: Basic JavaScript Data Types
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Data Types. Focus on implementing Primitive types (string, number, boolean, null, undefined, symbol, bigint) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Data Types
description: Create a function that uses Primitive types (string, number, boolean, null, undefined, symbol, bigint) and Reference types (object, array, function) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Data Types Project
description: Build a small application that applies Primitive types (string, number, boolean, null, undefined, symbol, bigint), Reference types (object, array, function), typeof operator in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Data Types
description: The following code has bugs related to Primitive types (string, number, boolean, null, undefined, symbol, bigint). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Data Types
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Primitive types (string, number, boolean, null, undefined, symbol, bigint) and Reference types (object, array, function).
